name: Magnesium Oil Spray
description: A topical magnesium chloride spray for transdermal magnesium supplementation — bypassing GI absorption issues associated with oral supplements.
effectivenessNote: Extensive anecdotal support. 2017 NIH review: transdermal evidence limited. Oral magnesium has stronger evidence. Low risk/cost = worth trying.
warnings: Transdermal absorption evidence limited (2017 NIH review)
Irritates broken or freshly shaved skin
Pair with dietary magnesium sources for best results
scienceNote: Magnesium = cofactor in 300+ reactions. Deficiency common. Transdermal question unsettled. Some pilot studies positive. Honest: probably works somewhat, pair with dietary sources.
